purpose: Register a peer-reviewed methodological counter-source arguing that many claimed Lambda-CDM falsifications are tensions or interpretive disputes rather than strict reproducible falsifications.

sources.title: The Fallacies of Lambda-CDM Falsifications
sources.author: Alain Blanchard
sources.venue: IntechOpen chapter in Cosmology Research - Addressing Current Problems with Astrophysics
usable_for: control source against overclaiming Lambda-CDM failure
not_usable_for: proof that Lambda-CDM tensions are irrelevant

boundary: Methodological counter-source map only. This does not execute a likelihood, prove Lambda-CDM final, reject Lambda-CDM, validate DFM-MKC, promote or reject an alternative model, or resolve any Clay problem.
